static.description: Server-rendered route with no external client runtime.

basic-island.description: Server-first route with navigation, forms, or small islands.

wasm-island.description: Route that intentionally loads the GoSX WASM island runtime.

scene3d.description: Interactive Scene3D route profiled on a throttled mobile-class browser.

water-ci.description: Water release route on CI software WebGL. Gates load, payload, and main-thread regressions; real-GPU frame cadence is certified separately.
